name: awesome-kit
description: Christina's cross-domain skills: a shared communication framework (hand-off + verbose-updates), meta-skills that evolve it (knowledge-encoding, update-documentation), and /plugin-ecosystem (interactive 16:9 HTML poster of marketplaces and plugins). Depends on plugins-kit:skills-kit for the shared audit framework. /claude-explorer moved to plugins-kit:prototypes in 0.5.0.
